correct_answer: Ancient forms of governance existed before modern democracies.
Tribal system was one of the earliest forms of political organization.
Leadership in tribal systems was based on personal characteristics like strength or wisdom.
Decision-making in tribal systems was decentralized among community members.
Monarchies emerged as societies grew in size and complexity.
